MJ/ LBJ is a close call. I prefer LBJ because how he can carry a franchise when time and time again his supporting cast either is injured or underperforming.
MJ has never done that, his two three-peats was built upon solid help from solid system - rodman pippen plus one of the best coaches in NBA.

LBJ has never had a superteam that fit so well. In heat there’s no ace stopper like rodman who can clamp down even Shaq.
Don’t even mention KLove’s defence.

However facts are facts - MJ at the end was 6-0.

As for Kobe ... I like him as a player , but I honestly don’t think he is on The same class - once a generation talent yes, GOAT level no.

I think Kobe / Duncan is a close call too.
